description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular black oven with a robust, boxy design and a prominent vertical chimney pipe extending from the top. The front features a large, square door with a glass window, likely for monitoring the interior, and a small handle on the right side for opening. The oven sits on four short, sturdy legs that slightly elevate it above the ground, and the top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body. The sides are plain, with one side showing a protruding handle, possibly for maneuvering or carrying. The back is featureless, with the chimney pipe centrally mounted. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, giving it a durable and industrial look suitable for urban outdoor or garage settings.
description: A black, boxy oven with a front glass door, vertical chimney, and sturdy metal construction. It features a flat top, short legs, and a side handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass door, handle, and chimney pipe above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain side panel and a protruding handle near the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless back with the chimney pipe centered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1 but without a visible handle.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel or external controls are present on any side of the oven. The design is minimalistic, with only a door and handle visible.
attribute_door_handle_type: A small, protruding, vertically mounted handle on the right side of the door, appearing to be made of metal or heat-resistant plastic, with a simple, utilitarian design.
attribute_window_presence: present, a large square glass window is set into the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
